4.3.9.2 SetSysWorkSpace
Function Usage
Sets the pointer to the system workspace, which is the workspace required by the
framework. When using high-level APIs such as 5.2.1 Matmul, you need to call
this API. When the project-based operator development mode or development
processes based on the kernel launch mode (-DHAVE_WORKSPACE is enabled) is
